steps.title: Spot the contrast signal
steps.content: The phrase “Of course” signals that Metzinger’s aim to depict a four‑dimensional race conflicts with the fact that humans can see only three dimensions, setting up a contrast between intention and limitation.

steps.title: Match the transition to the contrast
steps.content:
D uses “That said,” to show that despite the earlier limitation, Metzinger’s multi‑perspective view still offers a glimpse of a four‑dimensional world.
The other three choices either add an example, restate the idea, or simply add information, none of which express the needed contrast.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
